title: French omelette preparation
explanation: The chef demonstrates how to prepare a French omelette by cracking eggs into a bowl, establishing the core manipulable concept of egg quantity for the recipe

title: Egg cooking temperature and timing
explanation: The video demonstrates how to control egg texture by manipulating cooking time and temperature, which can be modeled as a function of heat and duration with visual feedback on doneness

params.expr: f(time, temp) = [set on edges, set in middle, caramelized brown]
